title: XIFT v1.0 Extension: quality
description: Artifact-level quality metrics (silently-ignorable extension). Source: xift-1.0-spec-extension-quality.md §2, §3.
x-xift-jcs-note: JCS signing (RFC 8785, core §8.3): this block is canonicalized as part of the envelope and signed in full (Ed25519). The numeric fields here (rates and counts) are the only float-bearing extension fields. The JCS pre-signing canonicalizer MUST reject NaN, +Infinity, -Infinity and -0.0 as protocol:crypto:canonicalization_failed (102); JSON Schema cannot express this (minimum:0 accepts -0.0, and NaN/Infinity are not valid JSON), so it is enforced at canonicalization time, not here.

metrics.x-xift-note: Spec §3.1 invariant not expressible in pure JSON Schema: completion_rate + fallback_rate <= 1.0 (the residual is the share of outright failures). Enforce in code.

user_acceptance_rate.x-xift-note: Optional; MAY be null when not measured (spec §3.1).

confidence.x-xift-note: Spec §3.2 invariant not expressible in pure JSON Schema: external_validation_count == length(external_validators). Enforce in code.
